{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = void (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The void is a place or state one can be snatched into from a ship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
